name: View Transitions — shared elements & lists
description: Shared morph: matching `name` on unmount+mount in same transition; `share` wins over `enter`/`exit` — provide fallbacks for paths where no pair forms. Names globally unique (`photo-${id}`). Reusable components: avoid one `name` mounted in modal+page simultaneously — conditional `name` or lift VT to consumer. List reorder: per-item `<ViewTransition key={id}>` inside `startTransition`; avoid extra wrapper `<div>` between list and VT. Compose list identity (outer VT keyed by item) + shared image (inner named VT) as two layers — missing either layer silences an animation.

metadata.intent: Implement shared element morphs and list reorder without subtle silent failures

must_use: Unique `name` per concurrently mounted morph target
Two-layer VT when list items also morph
must_not: Fade-out page exit when a morph share is active on that path (prefer directional slide)
conventions: List-side shared VTs: `default="none"` to avoid cross-fade on every filter keystroke.

steps.description: Enumerate each route pair: does a `name` pair exist? If not, ensure `enter`/`exit` still read well alone.
Audit reusable cards/images: only one named VT instance with the same `name` may be mounted at once.
For list→detail thumbnails, use outer `<ViewTransition key={item.id}>` and inner `<ViewTransition name={...} share="morph">` around the image.
